researchResults.title: Boston Dynamics brings its legged robots to the FIFA World Cup
researchResults.description:
Around the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Hyundai and Boston Dynamics have taught footwork to the Atlas humanoid, while the Spot robot is on patrol.

The post Boston Dynamics brings its legged robots to the FIFA World Cup appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Kraken Robotics acquires Covelya Group for $615M
researchResults.description:
Covelya Group expands Kraken Robotics' product offerings and total addressable market in subsea technology.

The post Kraken Robotics acquires Covelya Group for $615M appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: RoboBusiness 2026 call for speakers closes soon
researchResults.description:
RoboBusiness 2026, the premier event for developers of commercial robotics and those building robotics businesses, is seeking expert speakers.

The post RoboBusiness 2026 call for speakers closes soon appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Quantum Systems raises $1.2B to expand drone production and deployments
researchResults.description:
Quantum plans to use the proceeds to expand production capacity, strengthen supply chain resilience, and more.

The post Quantum Systems raises $1.2B to expand drone production and deployments appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Humanoid says KinetIQ Ascend reinforcement learning approaches human-level dexterity
researchResults.description:
Humanoid says its KinetIQ Ascend approach can reach 99.9% manipulation reliability at human speed and beyond for industrial tasks.

The post Humanoid says KinetIQ Ascend reinforcement learning approaches human-level dexterity appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
researchResults.description: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

researchResults.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
researchResults.description: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's headlines suggested.

researchResults.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
researchResults.description: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

researchResults.title: NVIDIA's CEO Projects $1 Trillion in AI Chip Sales as New Computing Era Begins
